identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a bilingual, culturally resonant public safety platform for Braj Holi that balances festival vibrancy with emergency utility.

primary.name: Braj Saffron
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key highlights

secondary.name: Marigold Yellow
secondary.usage: Secondary highlights, decorative elements, 'Moderate' crowd status

background.name: Vrindavan Cream
background.usage: Main background - avoids stark white for a warmer, traditional feel

headings.usage: Page titles, Hero text, Section headers. Supports Devanagari & Latin with high contrast.

body.usage: UI text, buttons, descriptions. Clean and legible.

hindi_fallback.usage: Ensure Hindi text is legible and properly aligned.

hero_crowd.usage: Hero section background or main visual

safety_placeholder.usage: Official alerts or help section (use discreetly)

icons.custom_needs: Use 'Siren' for SOS, 'MapPin' for location, 'Users' for crowd

SOSButton.specs: Fixed bottom-center (mobile) or bottom-right (desktop). Color: #DC2626. Shape: Circular (64px). Animation: Pulse effect.
SOSButton.interaction: Press and hold (2s) to activate to prevent accidental triggers.
SOSButton.label: SOS / मदद

LiveStatusTicker.specs: Top of page. Marquee or static banner. Color: Dynamic based on status (Green/Red).
LiveStatusTicker.content: Live crowd density updates for key locations (Banke Bihari, Prem Mandir, etc.)

LanguageToggle.specs: Prominent switch in Navbar. Options: EN | HI. Must change entire UI language instantly.

CrowdCard.specs: Card showing location name, current crowd level (Low/Med/High), and last updated time.
CrowdCard.visuals: Use color-coded bars or icons for crowd density.

home.layout: Control Room Lite. Hero with Map Preview + Status Ticker. Grid of quick actions (Schedule, Routes, Lost & Found).

map.layout: Full screen Leaflet/OSM. Floating search bar. Bottom sheet for location details.
map.features: Layers for: Water, Police, Medical, Toilets, Parking.

schedule.layout: Vertical Timeline. Date on left, Event details on right. Highlight 'Today's Events'.

emergency.layout: High contrast, minimal distractions. Big buttons for Police, Ambulance, Fire. 'Share Location' prominent.

general: Do not use gradients for text.
Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
All interactive elements must have hover/active states.
accessibility: All images must have alt text.
Focus states must be clearly visible (ring-2 ring-offset-2).
testing: All interactive elements must include data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the design using the specified colors and fonts. Prioritize the 'Saffron Safety' theme. Ensure the SOS button is always accessible. Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections. Build the map using 'react-leaflet' or similar OSM wrapper. Ensure bilingual support structure is in place (even if hardcoded for MVP).
